mission.title: kubearmor: KubeArmor BPF LSM Enforcer
mission.description:
- [x] Setup eBPF objects for BPF LSM program
- [x] Handle eBPF Maps on Container Events
- [x] Handle Default Posture Decisions and Eliminate Conflicting rules
- [x] Extract Path and Source in each set of Hooks
    - Currently Limited to 256 byte length
- [x] Basic Enforcement and Decision Making
	- [x] Process
	- [x] File
	- [x] Network
- [x] Update Dev Env
- Testing - Deferred till #760 

[Design Doc](https://github.com/kubearmor/KubeArmor/wiki/KubeArmor-BPF-LSM-Integration)

Ref #484

resolution.summary:
- It is possible that cri socket be named something different and cri runtime be different like EKS uses dockershim as socket but the runtime is containerd. So we decide based on the runtime and not configured socket

- Recent changes introduced docker getting instantiated later at runtime and not init time due to which we were not fetching already deployed containers, so added a check to instantiate docker handler if nil
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
